name: PLACER
description: Local docking for a protein/small molecule complex to sample conformations. Accurately generates structures of organic small molecules bound to active sites, and can accurately generate conformations of structures of small molecules and protein side chains. Enables generation of ensembles of solutions to model conformational heterogeneity.
capabilities: Local docking for a protein/small molecule complex to sample conformations
Accurately generates structures of organic small molecules bound to active sites, and can accurately generate conformations of structures of small molecules and protein side chains
Enables generation of ensembles of solutions to model conformational heterogeneity

complex_structure.description: Protein-ligand complex structure in PDB format with ligand positioned near binding site

flexible_sidechains.description: Allow protein side chain flexibility during local docking
